title: PRD Document Example
summary: A minimal structured `general-document` package used to validate the first executable PRD foundation.

children.text: Portable Responsive Documents start with a manifest-first contract.
This example proves the first executable PRD foundation with a canonical manifest and a structured content root.

children.caption: Declared assets remain referenced through the manifest.
Foundational lanes in the current executable stack

rows.focus: Structural truth and declared asset checks
Responsive rendering with honest support reporting

children.title: Current executable profile examples
children.caption: Structured charts keep their categories and numeric values explicit in the content model.
Optional packaged audio can enrich the reading surface without changing minimal validity.

children.text: The base document path uses `content/root.json` instead of an HTML-first website entry.

items: manifest.json is the canonical package control surface
general-document remains a profile, not the name for responsiveness
content is structured JSON rather than bundled page markup

children.text: PRD should remain portable, structured, and profile-based from the start.
